action: Review the 50 outcome-language flags first; most are safe blocker phrases, but final captions must distinguish blocked claims from supported claims in the same sentence.
acceptance_check: Every final caption mentioning adoption, rank, safety, cost, revenue, productivity, autonomy, energy, or replacement either removes the term or states the claim boundary clearly.
blocked_until_done: Caption beauty may launder unsupported outcome claims.

action: Add explicit rights/private-use/source-surface cues for the 22 captions with private, acquisition, ignored, or source-target-needed status.
acceptance_check: Each private-use or acquisition-ready exhibit caption names the use status or routes the caveat to a nearby note before layout.
blocked_until_done: A screenshot/photo/source-surface may appear publication-ready before rights and use are cleared.

action: Compress the 6 long captions; keep the teaching sentence short and move dense caveats to note fields.
acceptance_check: No final selected-100 caption body exceeds layout tolerance once render QA defines line length.
blocked_until_done: Dense captions may crowd pages and hide the actual teaching point.

action: Every comparison, ranking, benchmark, or price caption must name scope before implication.
acceptance_check: Caption includes source/date/scope or points to an adjacent methodology note before any sorted row, price, or score appears.
blocked_until_done: Readers may infer live crowns, price-quality frontiers, productivity, or broad intelligence.

action: Every product, screenshot, slide, paper, or photo surface must say what the surface can show and what it cannot prove.
acceptance_check: Caption or nearby note blocks adoption, revenue, safety, current-UI, deployment, capacity, workload, or market-share inference as relevant.
blocked_until_done: Concrete images may become false business or deployment evidence.

action: Mechanism captions should teach one pressure or transformation, not a priority fight or complete history.
acceptance_check: Early technical captions use mechanism verbs and avoid first-invention, architecture-alone, or modern-product equivalence claims.
blocked_until_done: Canonical diagrams may imply invention crowns or solved explanations.

action: Finale captions should carry motif and human judgment while leaving unresolved claims unresolved.
acceptance_check: Chapter 24 captions avoid prophecy, AGI, inevitability, solved trust, and one-company victory language.
blocked_until_done: The ending may turn visual synthesis into forecast or hype.

action: Caption excellence is not complete until line length, footnote proximity, and blocker visibility pass rendered PDF QA.
acceptance_check: Final PDF QA checks caption body length, note proximity, text extraction order, and visible source/blocker cues.
blocked_until_done: A clean TSV audit may overstate publication readiness without page evidence.
